findings.title: MarshalEnvelopeV2JSON mutates caller's struct in place
findings.description: The function sets e.Version = 2 as a side effect, violating marshal-is-read-only convention. Breaks round-trip fidelity, concurrent safety, and caller expectations.
findings.minimal_fix: Replace mutation with stack copy: out := *e; if out.Version == 0 { out.Version = 2 }; json.Marshal(&out)

findings.title: v1 fallback silently drops 5-6 live fields (P0 per fd-schema-evolution)
findings.description: Fields dropped: PolicyVersion, CapabilityScope, InputArtifactRefs, OutputArtifactRefs, RequestedSandbox, EffectiveSandbox. Active consumers: replay/reconstruct.go reads InputArtifactRefs/OutputArtifactRefs for timeline; store_test asserts sandbox non-empty; all writers produce PolicyVersion.
findings.concrete_failure: dispatch_events row with requested_sandbox parsed via v1 fallback loses sandbox data. After og7m.2.2 lands and scanEvents switches to v2 parsing, all v1 rows report empty sandboxes.
fix_options: Option A (preferred): Store entire v1 JSON as Payload (round-trip safe)
Option B: Map all six fields into top-level EventEnvelopeV2
Option C: Document that Version=1 callers MUST fall back to ParseEnvelopeJSON (unsafe during migration)

findings.title: scanEvents calls v1 parser — v2 envelopes silently zero after og7m.2.2
findings.description: When og7m.2.2 writes v2 blobs with only payload (no tracing fields), v1 parser sees IsZero()=true and returns nil. All new rows lose their envelope. TestListEvents_CausalReconstructionByTraceID fails in production.
findings.migration_contract_required: og7m.2.2 must NOT land until og7m.2.x (Event.Envelope type upgrade + scanEvents migration to v2) completes
findings.minimal_fix: Add explicit TODO comment linking og7m.2.2 dependency, or include compile-time gate

findings.title: phaseEventEnvelope shadow type unaddressed
findings.description: Private duplicate of EventEnvelope (8 vs 10 fields, missing RequestedSandbox/EffectiveSandbox). Marshals independently. After v2 lands, three parallel types exist with no consolidation plan.
findings.fix: Add // TODO(og7m.2.2): replace with event.EventEnvelopeV2 and include elimination in og7m.2.2 scope

findings.title: Payload type discriminator absent from envelope
findings.description: Three typed payloads share untyped json.RawMessage with no type/kind field. Caller must know type from Event.Source. No runtime dispatch capability.
impact: No runtime dispatch without Event.Source coupling
findings.minimal_fix: Add PayloadType string json:"payload_type,omitempty" with values 'phase', 'dispatch', 'coordination', ''

findings.title: PhasePayload duplicates Event.FromState/ToState (semantic double-write)
findings.description: PhasePayload.FromPhase/ToPhase duplicate Event.FromState/ToState. DispatchPayload.FromStatus/ToStatus duplicate the same. Creates two sources of truth with no consistency invariant.
findings.risk: Writer bug populates payload and column differently with no detector
fix_options: Remove payload fields (keep only on Event)
Document that payload is canonical and Event is denormalized copy, with single writer function

findings.title: MarshalEnvelopeV2JSON has no IsZero guard
findings.description: v1 returns nil,nil for zero envelopes (stored as NULL). v2 marshals zero-value as {"v":2}. Asymmetric with v1 behavior.
findings.impact: scanEvents (C3) will parse {"v":2} with v1 parser, trigger IsZero, and discard silently
findings.fix: Add IsZero() check to EventEnvelopeV2 and guard marshal

findings.title: Version=0 serializes as "v":0 without omitempty
findings.description: Version int json:"v" has no omitempty. Zero-value serializes as {"v":0,...}, which parses as v1 with Version=1. Round-trip break.
findings.fix: Add omitempty to Version tag: json:"v,omitempty"

findings.title: ParsePayload returns nil,nil for missing; indistinguishable from zero-value
findings.description: Returns (nil, nil) for absent payload. Same return for zero-value struct (PhasePayload{}). Caller cannot distinguish 'no payload' from 'zero-value payload'.
fix_options: Add IsZero() to payload types and have marshal check it
Document that zero-value payloads are semantically valid, callers must use nil to signal absence

findings.title: json.RawMessage renders as 'true' in schema, not '{}'
findings.description: invopop/jsonschema special-cases json.RawMessage as "payload": true (meaning 'any value'), not empty object. Both are semantically equivalent in JSON Schema 2020-12.

findings.title: Schema additionalProperties:false blocks v1 cross-validation
findings.description: Generated v2 schema has additionalProperties:false, which rejects v1 documents. But Go code accepts both via fallback parsing. Mismatch between schema and runtime.
fix_options: Document that schema validation should be skipped during v1→v2 migration
Publish event-envelope-any.json schema accepting either version

findings.title: json:"v" diverges from package naming convention
findings.description: All v1 fields use full snake_case (policy_version, caller_identity, trace_id). New Version field uses single-letter 'v'. Breaks consistency.
findings.fix: Use json:"version" or document abbreviation rationale

findings.title: Generated schemas are structurally unlinked
findings.description: Four contract entries (event-envelope-v2, phase-payload, dispatch-payload, coordination-payload) generate independent files with no oneOf references
findings.fix: Add oneOf annotation or document in contracts/events/README.md that schemas form a group

findings.title: Test fixtures missing for v1 fallback cases
findings.description: Plan lists 'parse actual v1 JSON' test cases without providing fixture strings. Implementor must reverse-engineer the shape.
findings.fix: Provide literal JSON constants in test spec

findings.title: CapabilityScope dropped without replacement
findings.description: CapabilityScope carries authorization boundary (run:{id}, dispatch:{id}, scope:{scope}). Not derivable from TraceID alone.
findings.fix: Add to top-level fields or document as deliberately dropped (verify no consumer reads it)

findings.title: CoordinationPayload lacks owner field
findings.description: v1 has owner AS from_state for coordination. v2 CoordinationPayload has no owner field. Forces callers to read overloaded Event.FromState.
findings.fix: Add Owner string json:"owner,omitempty" to CoordinationPayload

findings.title: Payload types have inconsistent required-field coverage
findings.description: PhasePayload requires from_phase/to_phase; DispatchPayload and CoordinationPayload have all fields optional
findings.fix: Audit against writers to determine which fields are always populated

verdict_detail.verdict_explanation: Three P1 blocking issues require fixes before implementation: marshal mutation, v1 field loss, and payload duplication. Five P2 important issues must be addressed before og7m.2.2. Eight P3 informational issues should be completed during schema generation.
verdict_detail.recommend_action: Return to author with consolidated feedback; fix C1, C2, P2-3; document P2-1, P2-2, C3; finalize P3 items before merge gate.
